title: Noviq — Web Dev Studio
description: Founded Noviq, a web development studio in Kochi building websites, Flutter apps, and AI-powered chatbots for local businesses.

title: VirtusCo Founder & CTO
description: Founded VirtusCo, a robotics-focused tech startup. Successfully shortlisted for startup incubation under IEDC.

title: Product Delivery Award
description: Contributed to the development of a Robo-Based Mobile Sensing System for Indoor Air Delivery Measurement at Rajagiri School of Engineering & Technology.

title: AI/ML Language Model Project
description: Started building transformer models from scratch, including RNN-based text generators and MiniGPT implementations.

title: Engineer Intern
description: Gained industrial experience in premium horn manufacturing, facility design, and electrical horn manufacturing at Roots Group of Companies.

title: Electric ATV Competition
description: Achieved podium finish in RC electric ATV competition at Saintgits College, competing against 12 colleges.

title: Industrial Internship
description: Gained experience in power transformer construction and testing at Kerala Electrical and Allied Engineering Company.

title: Started B.Tech
description: Began Bachelor of Technology in Applied Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering at Rajagiri School of Engineering & Technology.

title: Freelance Web Developer
description: Started developing responsive websites using Next.js for clients including VirtusCo and Yehi (Australia).

title: Higher Secondary Completion
description: Completed Higher Secondary Education with specialization in Electronics, C, C++, and Python at Model Technical Higher Secondary School.

title: Head of Electronics Club
description: Led and mentored three batches of 15 students, organized workshops and tech fests at Model Technical Higher Secondary School.

title: K.I.T.E. Technical Training
description: Top performer in technical training and educational initiatives by Kerala Infrastructure and Technology for Education.

title: Robotics Certification
description: Best performer in Robotics Intermediate Certification at Shrishti Robotics, excelling in robotics design and programming.
